CREATE TABLE ct_pay_list (
    ctrt_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    ver_no integer NOT NULL,
    pay_se_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    pay_odr integer NOT NULL,
    pay_amt numeric(18,2),
    pay_dt date,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ct_pay_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (ctrt_id, ver_no, pay_se_cd, pay_odr)
);
CREATE TABLE ct_subc_mst (
    ctrt_subc_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    ctrt_nm character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    ctrt_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    ctrt_se_cd character varying(20),
    ctrt_st_dt date,
    wk_st_dt date,
    ctrt_end_dt date,
    cnsgn_entr_nm character varying(100),
    ctrt_mthd_cd character varying(20),
    cmpl_scdl_dt date,
    ctrt_amt numeric(15,2),
    uclm_amt numeric(15,2),
    ctrt_stts_cd character varying(20),
    elc_apv_stat_cd character varying(20),
    extl_chgr_nm character varying(100),
    extl_dept_nm character varying(100),
    extl_eml character varying(100),
    innr_chgr_nm character varying(100),
    innr_dept_nm character varying(100),
    innr_telno character varying(100),
    innr_eml character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50),
    pay_ver_no integer
,    CONSTRAINT ct_subc_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (ctrt_subc_id)
);
CREATE TABLE my_etc_rslt_list (
    etc_rslt_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    etc_rslt_ctg_cd character varying(10),
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    user_id character varying(40),
    targ_yy_cd character varying(10),
    activ_desc character varying(100),
    activ_dt character varying(8),
    run_inst_nm character varying(30),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    fst_evl_score numeric(6,2),
    assr_id character varying(20),
    evl_dts timestamp without time zone,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT my_etc_rslt_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (etc_rslt_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_bod_activ_dtl (
    bod_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    activ_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    targr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    atnd_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_bod_activ_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (bod_id, activ_id, targr_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_bod_activ_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    yy_cd character varying(10),
    activ_ord_cd character varying(10),
    bod_cls_cd character varying(10),
    bod_meth_cd character varying(10),
    activ_nm character varying(30),
    activ_prps_desc character varying(100),
    hold_start_dt character varying(8),
    hold_start_tm character varying(6),
    hold_end_dt character varying(8),
    hold_end_tm character varying(6),
    activ_plc_nm character varying(30),
    activ_desc character varying(100),
    expd_mthd_desc character varying(100),
    activ_rslt_desc character varying(100),
    pclt_itms_desc character varying(500),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_bod_activ_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_bod_mbr_list (
    bod_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    mbr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    term_start_dt character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    term_end_dt character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    role_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_bod_mbr_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (bod_id, mbr_id, term_start_dt, term_end_dt)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_bod_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    bod_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_bod_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_cmte_activ_dtl (
    cmte_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    cmte_activ_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    cmte_targr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    atnd_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_cmte_activ_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (cmte_id, cmte_activ_id, cmte_targr_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_cmte_activ_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    activ_prps_desc character varying(100),
    activ_start_dt character varying(8),
    activ_start_tm character varying(6),
    activ_end_dt character varying(8),
    activ_end_tm character varying(6),
    scdl_reg_yn character varying(1),
    activ_plc_nm character varying(30),
    activ_desc character varying(100),
    expd_mthd_desc character varying(100),
    activ_rslt_desc character varying(100),
    pclt_itms_desc character varying(500),
    rslt_attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_cmte_activ_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_cmte_mbr_list (
    cmte_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    mbr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    term_start_dt character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    term_end_dt character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    role_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_cmte_mbr_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (cmte_id, mbr_id, term_start_dt, term_end_dt)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_cmte_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    cmte_role_desc character varying(100),
    base_rule_desc character varying(100),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_cmte_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_ext_emp_mst (
    user_id character varying(40) NOT NULL,
    hp_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    user_pw character varying(100),
    user_nm character varying(30),
    dept_nm character varying(30),
    posi_nm character varying(30),
    dty_nm character varying(30),
    birt_dt character varying(8),
    blng_nm character varying(30),
    tel_no character varying(20),
    email character varying(50),
    rmk character varying(500),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_ext_emp_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, hp_no)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_aply_dtl (
    rcrut_req_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    jbcls_cd character varying(10),
    mjr_fld_nm character varying(30),
    mjr_fld_dtl_desc character varying(100),
    rcrut_prd_mcnt smallint,
    rcrut_tnop_cnt integer,
    tc_wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    rcrut_attch_file_id character varying(20),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_aply_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (rcrut_req_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_aply_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    rcrut_tp_cd character varying(10),
    elc_apv_no character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_aply_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_doc_insp_appn_list (
    rcrut_noti_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    appn_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    appn_nm character varying(30),
    hp_no character varying(20),
    main_carr_desc character varying(100),
    qual_desc character varying(100),
    fina_edu_cd character varying(10),
    rcpt_dt character varying(8),
    insp_rslt_yn character varying(1),
    rmk character varying(500),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_doc_insp_appn_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (rcrut_noti_id, appn_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_doc_insp_jdg_list (
    rcrut_noti_id character varying(20),
    doc_insp_id character varying(20),
    jdg_id character varying(20),
    scdl_rel_mast_id character varying(20),
    scdl_rel_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)

);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_doc_insp_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) DEFAULT 1,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    doc_insp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    doc_insp_dt character varying(8),
    doc_insp_tm character varying(6),
    doc_insp_plc_nm character varying(30),
    mtrm_conn_yn character varying(1),
    wkly_scdl_reg_yn character varying(1),
    res_rsrv_id character varying(20),
    res_targr_id character varying(20),
    reg_apv_no character varying(20),
    rslt_apv_no character varying(20),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_doc_insp_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_doc_insp_oppn_list (
    appn_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    jdg_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    opnn_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    opnn_1_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_2_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_3_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_4_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_5_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_6_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_7_score numeric(6,2),
    insp_opnn_desc character varying(100),
    insp_rmk character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_doc_insp_oppn_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (appn_id, jdg_id, opnn_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_intv_insp_jdg_list (
    rcrut_noti_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    intv_insp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    jdg_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_intv_insp_jdg_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (rcrut_noti_id, intv_insp_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_intv_insp_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    intv_insp_id character varying(20),
    intv_insp_nm character varying(30),
    intv_insp_dt character varying(8),
    intv_insp_start_tm character varying(6),
    intv_insp_end_tm character varying(6),
    intv_insp_plc_nm character varying(50),
    reg_apv_no character varying(20),
    rslt_apv_no character varying(20),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_intv_insp_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_intv_insp_oppn_list (
    appn_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    jdg_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    opnn_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    opnn_1_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_2_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_3_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_4_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_5_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_6_score numeric(6,2),
    opnn_7_score numeric(6,2),
    insp_opnn_desc character varying(100),
    insp_rmk character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_intv_insp_oppn_list_pkey PRIMARY KEY (appn_id, jdg_id, opnn_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_noti_dtl (
    rcrut_noti_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    noti_dt character varying(8),
    doc_rcpt_start_dt character varying(8),
    doc_rcpt_end_dt character varying(8),
    doc_rcpt_end_tm character varying(6),
    doc_rcpt_psusr_noti_dt character varying(8),
    intv_plc_nm character varying(30),
    intv_insp_dt character varying(8),
    fina_psusr_noti_dt character varying(8),
    apmt_dt character varying(8),
    etc_desc1 character varying(30),
    etc_desc2 character varying(100),
    etc_desc3 character varying(100),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_noti_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (rcrut_noti_id)
);
CREATE TABLE ps_rcrt_noti_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '00001'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    rcrut_noti_id character varying(20),
    rcrut_noti_no character varying(20),
    rcrut_noti_stat_cd character varying(10),
    insd_apv_no character varying(20),
    ext_apv_no character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT ps_rcrt_noti_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_blob_triggers (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    trigger_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    blob_data bytea
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_blob_triggers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, trigger_name, trigger_group)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_calendars (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    calendar_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    calendar bytea NOT NULL
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_calendars_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, calendar_name)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_cron_triggers (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    trigger_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    cron_expression character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    time_zone_id character varying(80)
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_cron_triggers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, trigger_name, trigger_group)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_fired_triggers (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    entry_id character varying(95) NOT NULL,
    trigger_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    instance_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    fired_time bigint NOT NULL,
    sched_time bigint NOT NULL,
    priority integer NOT NULL,
    state character varying(16) NOT NULL,
    job_name character varying(200),
    job_group character varying(200),
    is_nonconcurrent boolean,
    requests_recovery boolean
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_fired_triggers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, entry_id)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_job_details (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    job_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    job_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    description character varying(250),
    job_class_name character varying(250) NOT NULL,
    is_durable boolean NOT NULL,
    is_nonconcurrent boolean NOT NULL,
    is_update_data boolean NOT NULL,
    requests_recovery boolean NOT NULL,
    job_data bytea
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_job_details_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, job_name, job_group)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_locks (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    lock_name character varying(40) NOT NULL
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_locks_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, lock_name)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_paused_trigger_grps (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_paused_trigger_grps_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, trigger_group)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_scheduler_state (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    instance_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    last_checkin_time bigint NOT NULL,
    checkin_interval bigint NOT NULL
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_scheduler_state_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, instance_name)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_simple_triggers (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    trigger_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    repeat_count bigint NOT NULL,
    repeat_interval bigint NOT NULL,
    times_triggered bigint NOT NULL
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_simple_triggers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, trigger_name, trigger_group)
);
CREATE TABLE qrtz_triggers (
    sched_name character varying(120) NOT NULL,
    trigger_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    trigger_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    job_name character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    job_group character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    description character varying(250),
    next_fire_time bigint,
    prev_fire_time bigint,
    priority integer,
    trigger_state character varying(16) NOT NULL,
    trigger_type character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    start_time bigint NOT NULL,
    end_time bigint,
    calendar_name character varying(200),
    misfire_instr smallint,
    job_data bytea
,    CONSTRAINT qrtz_triggers_pkey PRIMARY KEY (sched_name, trigger_name, trigger_group)
);

    elc_apv_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5),
    wrk_hst_id character varying(20),
    elc_apv_no character varying(20),
    elc_apv_stat_cd character varying(10),
    drft_dt character varying(8),
    drftr_id character varying(20),
    apv_cmpltn_dts timestamp without time zone,
    rjct_dts timestamp without time zone,
    drft_cncl_dts timestamp without time zone,
    elc_apv_addr character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),

    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    prj_mngt_nm character varying(30),
    rsch_start_dt character varying(8),
    rsch_end_dt character varying(8),
    prj_ordr_nm character varying(30),
    prj_ordr_dept_nm character varying(30),

    rsch_mgr_nm character varying(30),

    rsch_prj_stop_dt character varying(8),
    rsch_prj_rsm_dt character varying(8),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),

    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    drft_yn character varying(1),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_plnd_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rschr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rschr_tp_cd character varying(10),
    prtn_prd_start_dt character varying(8),
    prtn_prd_end_dt character varying(8),

    evl_rte numeric(7,4),

    wrk_rmk character varying(100),

    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    rview_tmlt_start_dt character varying(8),
    rview_tmlt_end_dt character varying(8),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),

);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    rmk_1_desc character varying(100),
    rmk_2_desc character varying(100),
    rmk_3_desc character varying(100),
    adpt_rslt_cd character varying(10),
    joint_sngl_tp_cd character varying(10),
    insd_outsd_tp_cd character varying(10),
    prd_desc character varying(100),

    wrk_rmk character varying(100),

    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    rmk_1_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_2_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_3_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_4_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_5_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_6_desc character varying(1000),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    rcpt_dt character varying(8),
    drft_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_prj_rcpt_mst_pk PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20),
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1),
    use_yn character varying(1),
    del_yn character varying(1),
    rmk_1_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_2_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_3_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_4_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_5_desc character varying(1000),
    rmk_6_desc character varying(1000),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    rcpt_dt character varying(8),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50),
    drft_yn character varying(1)

);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_prj_run_insp_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE rp_prus_rslt_req_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    rslt_req_prd_start_dt character varying(8),
    rslt_req_prd_end_dt character varying(8),
    prus_rslt_tp_cd character varying(10),
    prus_rslt_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_prus_rslt_req_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);
CREATE TABLE rp_rdc_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    insp_ctg_cd character varying(10),
    insp_nm character varying(30),
    insp_agnd_desc character varying(100),
    insp_dt character varying(8),
    insp_start_tm character varying(6),
    insp_end_tm character varying(6),
    insp_plc_nm character varying(30),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    fix_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_rdc_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    opnn_evl_dtl_item_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),

    del_yn character varying(1),
    insp_targr_id character varying(20),

    attch_file_id character varying(20),

);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE rp_rpdc_mst (
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    plgr_rte numeric(7,4),
    attch_file_cpkl_id character varying(20),
    attch_file_fina_rpdc_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),

);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),

    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),

    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,

    insp_dt character varying(8),
    insp_start_tm character varying(6),
    insp_end_tm character varying(6),

    rsch_budg_dtl_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5),
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    prj_mngt_no character varying(20),
    prj_targ_yy character varying(4),
    rsch_ctg_cd character varying(10),
    rsch_cls_cd character varying(10),
    prj_nm character varying(30),
    prj_mngt_nm character varying(30),
    rsch_start_dt character varying(8),
    rsch_end_dt character varying(8),
    prj_ordr_nm character varying(30),
    prj_ordr_dept_nm character varying(30),
    rsch_mgr_tp_cd character varying(10),
    rsch_mgr_nm character varying(30),
    dg_yn character varying(1),
    base_prj_yn character varying(1),
    fcs_prj_yn character varying(1),
    outsd_cnsmt_incl_yn character varying(1),
    prnt_partner_nm character varying(30),
    evl_cmte_wghtd_val_val numeric(6,2),
    rsch_ctg_larg_cd character varying(10),
    prj_targ_no character varying(10),
    si_gun_prj_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(30),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(30),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_rsch_prj_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id, rsch_prj_id)
);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5),
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1),
    use_yn character varying(1),
    del_yn character varying(1),
    insp_nm character varying(30),
    insp_agnd_desc character varying(100),
    insp_dt character varying(8),
    insp_start_tm character varying(6),
    insp_end_tm character varying(6),

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_hst_fina_id character varying(20),
    end_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    use_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    insp_nm character varying(30),
    insp_agnd_desc character varying(100),
    insp_dt character varying(8),
    insp_start_tm character varying(6),
    insp_end_tm character varying(6),
    insp_plc_nm character varying(30),
    attch_file_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_serv_insp_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_mast_id)
);

    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    insp_targr_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),

CREATE TABLE rp_wrk_hst_dtl (
    wrk_hst_dtl_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_hst_id character varying(20),
    wrk_mast_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20),
    chg_tp_cd character varying(10),
    phys_col_nm character varying(30),
    logc_col_nm character varying(30),
    old_data character varying(100),
    new_data character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_wrk_hst_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_hst_dtl_id)
);
CREATE TABLE rp_wrk_hst_mst (
    wrk_hst_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_tbl_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20),
    wrk_chasu character varying(5),
    wrk_hst_chasu character varying(5),
    chg_tp_cd character varying(10),
    old_data jsonb,
    new_data jsonb,
    chg_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_wrk_hst_mst_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_hst_id)
);
CREATE TABLE rp_wrk_hst_stat_info (
    wrk_stat_hst_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    rsch_prj_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_tbl_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    wrk_mast_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_chasu character varying(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::character varying,
    wrk_mast_uppr_tbl_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_mast_uppr_id character varying(20),
    old_prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    new_prgrs_stat_cd character varying(10),
    chg_resn_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT rp_wrk_hst_stat_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_stat_hst_id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_alarm_send_desc_tmp (
    reg_seq integer,
    call_to character varying(30),
    call_from character varying(30),
    message character varying(4000),
    template_code character varying(30),
    fallback_type character varying(3),
    fallback_subject character varying(60),
    fallback_message character varying(4000),
    msg_etc1 character varying(160),
    msg_etc2 character varying(160),
    msg_etc3 character varying(160),
    msg_etc4 character varying(160),
    msg_etc5 character varying(160),
    msg_etc6 character varying(160),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50),
    rsrv_yn character varying(1),
    rsrv_dts timestamp without time zone,
    btn_nm1 character varying(40),
    btn_mobl_desc1 character varying(100),
    btn_pc_desc1 character varying(100),
    btn_nm2 character varying(40),
    btn_mobl_desc2 character varying(100),
    btn_pc_desc2 character varying(100),
    btn_nm3 character varying(40),
    btn_mobl_desc3 character varying(100),
    btn_pc_desc3 character varying(100)

);
CREATE TABLE sy_approval_info (
    appro_key bigint NOT NULL,
    out_process_code character varying(50),
    form_id character varying(50),
    file_list character varying(200),
    contents_str text,
    subject_str character varying(200),
    doc_id character varying(50),
    a10_user_id character varying(50),
    a10_emp_seq character varying(50),
    a10_dept_seq character varying(50),
    a10_comp_seq character varying(50),
    a10_group_seq character varying(50),
    table_nm character varying(100),
    table_key character varying(100),
    req_emp_no character varying(20),
    apv_state_cd character varying(5),
    apv_dt character varying(8),
    apv_emp_no character varying(20),
    service_url character varying(256),
    ref_doc_id character varying(100),
    next_apvr character varying(50),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_approval_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (appro_key)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_approval_info_ud_log (
    id bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sy_approval_info_ud_log_id_seq'::regclass),
    op text NOT NULL,
    old_data jsonb,
    new_data jsonb,
    changed_by text,
    client_addr text,
    server_addr text,
    log_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
,    CONSTRAINT sy_approval_info_ud_log_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_batch_job_config (
    job_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    job_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    job_path character varying(100),
    exec_cycl character varying(50),
    use_yn character varying(1),
    fina_exec_stat character varying(10),
    fina_exec_cnt bigint,
    apply_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_batch_job_config_pk PRIMARY KEY (job_cd)
);

    id bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sy_batch_job_config_ud_log_id_seq'::regclass),
    op text NOT NULL,
    old_data jsonb,
    new_data jsonb,
    changed_by text,
    client_addr text,
    server_addr text,
    log_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
,    CONSTRAINT sy_batch_job_config_ud_log_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_batch_job_log (
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    exec_dt character varying(8) NOT NULL,
    job_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    start_dts timestamp without time zone,
    end_dts timestamp without time zone,
    exec_rslt character varying(50),
    exec_cnt bigint,
    exec_msg text,
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_batch_job_log_pk PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

    id bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sy_batch_job_log_ud_log_id_seq'::regclass),
    op text NOT NULL,
    old_data jsonb,
    new_data jsonb,
    changed_by text,
    client_addr text,
    server_addr text,
    log_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
,    CONSTRAINT sy_batch_job_log_ud_log_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_batch_pgm_exec (
    exec_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    exec_proc_id character varying(100),
    exec_vrbl_desc character varying(200),
    exec_stat_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'R'::character varying,
    err_msg_desc character varying(2000),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    req_pgm_id character varying(20),
    req_user_id character varying(20),
    req_ip character varying(50),
    req_dts timestamp without time zone,
    exec_dts timestamp without time zone,
    end_dts timestamp without time zone
,    CONSTRAINT sy_batch_pgm_exec_pkey PRIMARY KEY (exec_no)

    proc_id character varying(100) NOT NULL,

    id bigint NOT NULL,

    req_emp_no character varying(20),
    parm1 character varying(50),
    parm2 character varying(50),
    parm3 character varying(50),
    parm4 character varying(50),
    parm5 character varying(50),
    parm6 character varying(50),
    parm7 character varying(50),

    parm9 character varying(50),
    parm10 character varying(50),

    parm12 character varying(50),
    parm13 character varying(50),

    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),

CREATE TABLE sy_code_dtl (
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2) NOT NULL,
    cd_tp_cd character varying(3) NOT NULL,
    comm_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    comm_cd_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    sort_ord smallint,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    rel_wrk_tp_cd character varying(2),
    rel_cd_tp_cd character varying(3),
    rel_comm_cd character varying(10),
    cd_prop_val1 character varying(100),
    cd_prop_val2 character varying(100),
    cd_prop_val3 character varying(100),
    cd_prop_val4 character varying(100),
    cd_prop_val5 character varying(100),
    comm_cd_desc character varying(200),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_code_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (wrk_tp_cd, cd_tp_cd, comm_cd)
);

    id bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sy_code_dtl_ud_log_id_seq'::regclass),
    op text NOT NULL,
    old_data jsonb,
    new_data jsonb,
    changed_by text,
    client_addr text,
    server_addr text,
    log_dts timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
,    CONSTRAINT sy_code_dtl_ud_log_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

    wrk_tp character varying(2) NOT NULL,
    cd_tp character varying(3) NOT NULL,
    cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    kor_nm character varying(100),
    eng_nm character varying(50),
    use_yn character varying(1),
    sort_ord character varying(3),
    reg_psbl_dept character varying(5),
    rmk character varying(200),
    rel_cd character varying(10),
    reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),

    ip character varying(50)

CREATE TABLE sy_code_mst (
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2) NOT NULL,
    cd_tp_cd character varying(3) NOT NULL,
    cd_tp_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    sys_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    cd_tp_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),

);
CREATE TABLE sy_col_info_sjerp (
    table_catalog name NOT NULL,
    table_schema name NOT NULL,
    table_name name NOT NULL,
    column_name name NOT NULL,
    ordinal_position integer,
    column_default character varying,
    is_nullable character varying(3),
    data_type character varying,
    character_maximum_length integer,
    character_octet_length integer,
    numeric_precision integer,
    numeric_precision_radix integer,
    numeric_scale integer,
    datetime_precision integer,
    interval_type character varying,
    interval_precision integer,
    character_set_catalog name,
    character_set_schema name,
    character_set_name name,
    collation_catalog name,
    collation_schema name,
    collation_name name,
    domain_catalog name,
    domain_schema name,
    domain_name name,
    udt_catalog name,
    udt_schema name,
    udt_name name,
    scope_catalog name,
    scope_schema name,
    scope_name name,
    maximum_cardinality integer,
    dtd_identifier name,
    is_self_referencing character varying(3),
    is_identity character varying(3),
    identity_generation character varying,
    identity_start character varying,
    identity_increment character varying,
    identity_maximum character varying,
    identity_minimum character varying,
    identity_cycle character varying(3),
    is_generated character varying,
    generation_expression character varying,
    is_updatable character varying(3)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_col_info_sjerp_pk PRIMARY KEY (table_catalog, table_schema, table_name, column_name)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_comp_info (
    comp_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    biz_no character varying(20),
    corp_no character varying(20),
    tel_no character varying(20),
    fax_no character varying(20),
    post_no character varying(10),
    base_addr character varying(100),
    dtl_addr character varying(100),
    ceo_nm character varying(30),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50),
    id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('sy_comp_info_id_seq'::regclass)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_comp_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_dept_apmt_info (
    apmt_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    apmt_nm character varying(100),
    emp_no character varying(20),
    apmt_dt character varying(8),
    bef_dept_cd character varying(10),
    apmt_dept_cd character varying(10),
    bef_mtjob_dept_cd character varying(10),
    apmt_mtjob_dept_cd character varying(10),
    auth_apply_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_dept_apmt_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (apmt_no, user_id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_dept_brndz_info (
    dept_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_dept_brndz_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (dept_cd)

CREATE TABLE sy_dept_info (
    dept_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    dept_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    uppr_dept_cd character varying(10),
    dept_mngr_id character varying(20),
    cc_cd character varying(10),
    disp_yn character varying(1),
    use_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_dept_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (dept_cd)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_env_info (
    env_cd character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    env_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    env_val character varying(100),
    env_cd_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_env_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (env_cd)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_err_list (
    err_key bigint NOT NULL,
    err_dt character varying(10),
    err_type character varying(50),
    err_object character varying(50),
    err_content character varying(300),
    reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    reg_user_id character varying(20),
    reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_err_list_pk PRIMARY KEY (err_key)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_err_log_info (
    err_key bigint NOT NULL,
    err_dt character varying(10),
    err_type character varying(50),
    err_object character varying(50),
    err_content character varying(300),
    reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    reg_user_id character varying(20),
    reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_err_log_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (err_key)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_esp_user_info (
    comp_nm character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    rprs_comp_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL,
    emp_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    user_id character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    user_nm character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    dept_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    dept_nm character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    posi_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    posi_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    dty_cd character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    dty_nm character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    retr_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL,
    hp_no character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    inln_no character varying(40) NOT NULL,
    email_addr character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    useyn character varying(1)

);
CREATE TABLE sy_file_info (
    file_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    file_seq character varying(5) NOT NULL,
    save_file_nm character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    org_file_nm character varying(150),
    file_tp character varying(200),
    file_path character varying(100),
    file_val character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_file_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (file_id, file_seq)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_grp_auth_info (
    grp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    srch_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    new_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    save_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    prnt_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    upld_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    init_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc1_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc2_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc3_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc4_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc5_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc6_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc7_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc8_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc9_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc10_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl1_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl2_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl3_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl4_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl5_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl6_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl7_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl8_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl9_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl10_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_grp_auth_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (grp_id, pgm_id)
);

    grp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    dept_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_grp_dept_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (grp_id, dept_cd)
);

    grp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    grp_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    sort_ord smallint,
    grp_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,

    grp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,

,    CONSTRAINT sy_grp_user_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (grp_id, user_id)

CREATE TABLE sy_log_info (
    log_key bigint NOT NULL,
    log_dt character varying(10),
    log_type character varying(10),
    log_content character varying(50),
    reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    reg_user_id character varying(20),
    reg_ip character varying(50),
    log_rmk text
,    CONSTRAINT sy_log_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (log_key)
);

    lunc_dt character varying(8),
    solc_dt character varying(8),
    yun_yn smallint

);
CREATE TABLE sy_menu_info (
    menu_mdul_id character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    menu_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,

    uppr_menu_id character varying(20),

    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),

    menu_mdul_id character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_tp_id character varying(3) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_tp_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_tp_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_menu_mdul_dtl_pk PRIMARY KEY (menu_mdul_id, menu_mdul_tp_id)
);

    menu_mdul_id character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_snm character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    sort_ord smallint,
    menu_mdul_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_menu_mdul_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (menu_mdul_id)
);

    menu_mdul_id character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    menu_mdul_snm character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    sort_ord smallint,

CREATE TABLE sy_pgm_info (
    pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    pgm_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2),
    pgm_ctg_cd character varying(3),
    pgm_path character varying(100),
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    srch_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    new_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    save_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    prnt_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    upld_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    init_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc_desc1 character varying(30),
    etc_desc2 character varying(30),
    etc_desc3 character varying(30),
    etc_desc4 character varying(30),
    etc_desc5 character varying(30),
    etc_desc6 character varying(30),
    etc_desc7 character varying(30),
    etc_desc8 character varying(30),
    etc_desc9 character varying(30),
    etc_desc10 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc1 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc2 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc3 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc4 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc5 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc6 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc7 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc8 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc9 character varying(30),
    spcl_desc10 character varying(30),
    pgm_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50),
    menu_mdul_tp_id character varying(20),
    menu_mdul_id character varying(20)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_pgm_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (pgm_id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_prnt_dtl (
    ref_pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    prnt_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    prnt_nm character varying(30),
    prnt_path character varying(100),
    sort_ord smallint,
    use_yn character varying(1),
    src_pgm_id character varying(20),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_prnt_dtl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (ref_pgm_id, prnt_id)
);

    pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    prnt_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    prnt_nm character varying(30),
    menu_mdul_id character varying(2),
    menu_mdul_tp_id character varying(3),
    prnt_path character varying(100),
    sort_ord smallint,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(50),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)

);
CREATE TABLE sy_user_auth_info (
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    grp_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    srch_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    new_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    save_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    del_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    prnt_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    upld_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    init_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc1_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc2_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc3_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc4_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc5_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc6_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc7_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc8_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc9_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    etc10_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl1_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl2_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl3_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl4_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl5_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl6_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl7_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl8_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl9_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    spcl10_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_user_auth_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, grp_id, pgm_id)
);
