    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    bizd_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    main_bizd_yn character varying(1),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_user_bizd_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, bizd_cd)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_user_brndz_info (
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    main_brndz_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_user_brndz_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_user_dept_info (
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    dept_cd character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    main_comp_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL,
    main_dept_yn character varying(1) NOT NULL,
    emp_no character varying(20),
    pstn_cd character varying(10),
    dty_cd character varying(10),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_user_dept_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, dept_cd)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_user_info (
    user_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    user_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    emp_no character varying(20),
    pstn_cd character varying(10),
    dty_cd character varying(10),
    join_dt character varying(8),
    retr_dt character varying(8),
    hlof_tp_cd character varying(10),
    tel_no character varying(20),
    hp_no character varying(20),
    zip_no character varying(10),
    base_addr character varying(100),
    dtl_addr character varying(100),
    email character varying(50),
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    pos_use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    postalk_use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    ext_user_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    auto_updt_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    isf_login_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'N'::character varying,
    isf_login_pwd character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_user_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_wrk_tp_info (
    wrk_tp_cd character varying(2) NOT NULL,
    wrk_tp_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    sort_ord smallint,
    use_yn character varying(1) DEFAULT 'Y'::character varying,
    wrk_tp_desc character varying(100),
    wrk_rmk character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone,
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_wrk_tp_info_pk PRIMARY KEY (wrk_tp_cd)
);
CREATE TABLE sy_xls_info (
    pgm_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    xls_seq character varying(5) NOT NULL,
    xls_nm character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    file_id character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    xls_desc character varying(100),
    firs_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    firs_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    firs_reg_ip character varying(50),
    fina_reg_pgm_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_dts timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now(),
    fina_reg_user_id character varying(20),
    fina_reg_ip character varying(50)
,    CONSTRAINT sy_xls_info_pkey PRIMARY KEY (pgm_id, xls_seq)
);
